extra.reasoning: The property G(opted_out implies not sent) is violated by transition [t4], which sets sent:=true on send_attempt when (opted_out and acc==7). The step_0/step_1/step_2 events update acc via (3*acc+c) mod 32 (c=15,14,17 respectively; the triple nested if-then-else exactly implements mod 32 since 3*31+17=110<3*32+32) while leaving opted_out unchanged, so acc can be driven to any reachable residue after opt-out. Concrete trace from initial state (opted_out=false,sent=false,acc=0): optout sets opted_out=true,acc=0; step_0 -> acc=15; step_2 -> acc=(45+17)%32=30; step_1 -> acc=(90+14)%32=8; step_0 -> acc=(24+15)%32=7; now opted_out=true and acc==7, so send_attempt fires [t4] setting sent:=true. Final reachable state opted_out=true, sent=true violates the property. The trace uses 6 events, within the 34-event bound.
